__fixture__.name: entry_row_clone_remote_repository_start_center
__fixture__.scenario: User picks Clone Repository from the Start Center. The chooser emits one entry_chooser_row_record with entry_chooser_row_kind = remote, entry_verb_candidate = clone, target_kind_candidates = [remote_repository], resulting_mode_candidates = [clone_then_review, clone_then_open], trust_posture_class = trust_never_implied_by_clone (clone never grants trust), profile_default_class = default_profile (a clone never inherits the source repo's profile). The remote requires OAuth so account_opt_in_posture = required_for_this_row and next_step_decision_hooks names reauth_required verbatim. Demonstrates §3 verb matrix (clone row), §3.2 rule 4 (trust posture is verb-bound), §3.2 rule 5 (profile default is verb-bound), §4.8 disclosure rule 1 (account opt-in disclosed in-place).
contract_sections: §4.8 Disclosure rule 1 Account opt-in disclosed in-place

presentation_subtitle: Cloning never grants trust. The clone lands in labelled staging until you review it.
